_comment: CHAD Kraken trusted paper-fill + lunch-money sizing config. Backs the trusted fill engine (fees + slippage) and the min-size bump/skip sizing decision. STRICT/fail-closed loader (chad/execution/kraken_trading_config.py): unknown non-underscore key => refuse; missing required key => refuse; wrong type => refuse. Rows marked operator_verify:true carry documented public values that could NOT be verified offline against the live Kraken account/endpoint and must be confirmed by the operator before any enforce/live promotion.

taker_fee._source: Kraken Pro published spot TAKER fee, base 30-day-volume tier (<= $10k) = 0.26%. Matches the existing repo constant paper_exec_evidence_writer.py _CRYPTO_FEE_TAKER_PCT=0.0026. Live per-account TradeVolume tier NOT queryable offline.

slippage_model._note: CHAD modeling assumption (NOT a Kraken-published value). Marketable orders cross the spread (taker) and pay a bps impact floor. buy fill = mid*(1 + half_spread_frac + impact_frac); sell fill = mid*(1 - half_spread_frac - impact_frac); impact_frac = slippage_impact_floor_bps/1e4. The floor keeps fee/impact drag visible at ~$185 size rather than modeled as zero.

min_order_size_by_pair._source: Carried forward from execution_pipeline.py _KRAKEN_MIN_VOLUMES (repo's existing documented Kraken minima, base currency, keyed on REST altname). Live AssetPairs.ordermin NOT queryable offline.
